## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the existing format and style
- [ ] All links I've added are working
- [ ] I have checked for duplicate entries
- [ ] Resources are placed in the correct category
- [ ] Resources are sorted alphabetically within their category
- [ ] I have added descriptions for new resources
- [ ] My commit messages are clear and descriptive
